stories.headline: Western Union to launch USDPT, Solana-based stablecoin, this month to replace SWIFT internally
stories.tldr: Western Union will roll out USDPT, a Solana-issued dollar stablecoin, in May to settle internal agent transfers and bypass SWIFT.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A 174-year-old remittance giant moving its settlement layer onto Solana validates stablecoin rails for legacy payments — and pumps real cash flow into SOL fees.
the_details: USDPT will act as Western Union's internal settlement asset between agents in 200+ countries, cutting reliance on SWIFT.
Launch slots into Solana's Q3 Alpenglow upgrade roadmap, which targets ~150ms finality versus today's ~12s.
SOL ETF inflows fell to $39.93M in April — the weakest month since the products launched in October 2025.

stories.headline: April was crypto's worst month for hacks ever: $629M stolen across ~30 incidents
stories.tldr: Crypto lost roughly $629.69M across 28-30 separate exploits in April 2026, making it the costliest hack month on record.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: One attack a day is now the baseline. Banks eyeing on-chain rails — Jefferies flagged this — are pausing pilots until DeFi proves it can defend bridges.
the_details: KelpDAO lost ~$292M on April 18 after a misconfigured LayerZero setting let an attacker mint 116,500 unbacked rsETH.
Drift Protocol on Solana was drained of $285M on April 1, traced to a six-month DPRK-linked intelligence operation.
Vercel disclosed an April 20 breach that may have leaked customer API keys, forcing crypto teams to rotate credentials.

stories.headline: JPMorgan pegs Bitcoin support at $77K, stays 'positive' on crypto into 2026
stories.tldr: JPMorgan analysts see $77,000 as the floor for BTC and stay constructive on 2026 flows, betting Clarity Act passage reignites institutional buying.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A bulge-bracket bank publicly defending a $77K floor gives long-only desks cover to buy the dip — and ties future upside to Washington moving the Clarity Act.
the_details: Kalshi prediction markets price a 64% probability BTC holds above $76,000 through tomorrow's 5pm EDT close.
BTC closed April up ~13%, but $110M in leveraged longs were liquidated as Fed signaled higher-for-longer rates.
Grok's near-term BTC target sits at $88K-$95K; ETH projection range is $2,500-$2,800.

stories.headline: Standard Chartered cuts Solana 2026 target to $250, sees pivot from memecoins to micropayments
stories.tldr: StanChart trimmed its end-2026 SOL target to $250 but lifted the 2030 forecast to $2,000, citing a shift to stablecoin micropayments.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The bank is signaling Solana's bull case is no longer pump.fun rotation — it's payments throughput. Western Union's USDPT lands directly into that thesis.
the_details: End-2026 SOL price target cut to $250 from prior estimate; 2030 target raised to $2,000.
Memecoin-driven fee revenue has slumped while stablecoin transfer volume on Solana keeps climbing.
Solana DeFi TVL hit $11.5B with lending markets at $3.6B by end of 2025.

stories.headline: Galaxy posts $216M Q1 loss as Novogratz pivots growth bet to data centers
stories.tldr: Galaxy Digital reported a $216M Q1 net loss, blaming the crypto 'transition year' while CEO Mike Novogratz doubled down on AI data center buildout.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A bellwether crypto financial firm is reframing itself as an AI infrastructure play. Expect more crypto majors to chase data center revenue as token speculation cools.
the_details: Q1 net loss of $216M driven primarily by mark-to-market crypto price declines.
Novogratz publicly bullish on Helios data center campus and broader compute leasing pipeline.
Galaxy joins a growing list of crypto firms — including miners — repositioning hardware for AI workloads.
